title: Moancraft
description: Fabric modpack with an Origins base.  the pack contain around 160 mods (some jij) and pushes exploration as well as some grinding tech..
body:
Fabric modpack with an Origins base. the pack contain around 160 mods (some jij) and pushes exploration as well as some grinding tech.. the pack contains no graves mod much to the disappointment of many, but it does have REI so you can view most items available from the get-go. also all recipes unlocked on entering the world which is nice. ostensibly built to run on a server because at some point you'll feel like help may be required. Zombies are super annoying, they have custom moaning speech such as "cut the lawn!" and "stop watching football!" ram recommended RAM allocation : 6Gb minimum RAM allocation : 4Gb includes :
